A Haunted House 2 (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,329,487Details
International Box Office $3,877,374
Worldwide Box Office $21,206,861
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,990,810
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,003,199
Total $3,994,009
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Malcolm, after exorcising the demons of his ex, is starting fresh with his new girlfriend and her two children. After moving into their dream home, Malcolm is once again plagued by bizarre paranormal events. This time… it’s not just the house that’s haunted!

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,843,875 (51.0% of total gross)
Legs:1.96 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:81.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$4,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,310 opening theaters/2,310 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $25,368,500

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 18th, 2014 (Wide) by Open Road
International Releases: April 24th, 2014 (Wide) (Brazil)
June 12th, 2014 (Wide) (Argentina)
June 27th, 2014 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
June 27th, 2014 (Wide) (Venezuela)
July 17th, 2014 (Wide) (Singapore)
Video Release: August 12th, 2014 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for crude and sexual content, nudity, pervasive language, drug use and some violent images.
(Rating bulletin 2309, 2/12/2014)
Running Time: 87 minutes
Franchise: A Haunted House
Cast, crew, or production detail: Found Footage, Screenplay Written By the Star
Plot point: Haunting, Paranormal Investigation, Possessed, Psychics, Religious, Spoof
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Multiple Creative Types
Production/Financing Companies: Baby Way, IM Global, Endgame Releasing, Automatik
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
